name: Avoiding and Distracting Monsters
description: Monsters attack or pursue whatever they see, save the intelligent avoiding superior force; no avoiding a surprising monster within 20 feet. Flight: pursuit continues straight while within 90 feet; corners, doors, and stairs shake pursuit except on 1-2 (secret doors: only on 1). Speed differences open or close the gap (encumbrance vs the Monster Table); dropping treasure, weapons, or shields lightens the load. A surprised character drops an item 25% of the time. Burning oil deters many pursuers; food distracts the unintelligent 90%, semi-intelligent 50%, intelligent 10% — treasure the reverse.
